purpose: Define how maintained L2 scenario seeds feed root fixture generation, state-building, simulation initialization, ethics review, narrative rendering, and canon-promotion review without turning scenario seeds into scripted outcomes.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: No generated fixture path may target GUMAS_SIM_2.5/CanonRec or GUMAS_SIM_2.5/Aurora_Sim_Architecture/aurora-cloudbank-symbolic-main.
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Preserve scenario pressures and degrees of freedom; do not collapse expected end states into assertions that one ending must occur.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: State-builder packets remain root receipts until an explicit nested adapter task is claimed.
uptake_surfaces.nested_repo_gate: explicit CloudBank or narrative-engine task required before implementation writes
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Convert prose into possible starting conditions and pressure maps, not final facts.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: Root uptake packets may be read by a future adapter, but this contract does not execute GUMAS.
uptake_surfaces.nested_repo_gate: explicit runtime verification and GUMAS mutation authorization required
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Treat expected end states as observation categories for branch coverage, not scripted endpoints.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: Ethics outputs are receipts or review prompts, not runtime commands.
uptake_surfaces.nested_repo_gate: separate ethics-engine integration task required for nested runtime use
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Flag unsafe pressure handling without preselecting the safe narrative outcome.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: Narrative rendering should read simulation output and source provenance; it must not rewrite source cards.
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Narrative text explains observed events after they emerge; it does not choose the event path.

uptake_surfaces.handoff_path_policy: No CanonRec write is permitted by this contract.
uptake_surfaces.nested_repo_gate: explicit CanonRec promotion task and aurora-canon-reconciler review required
uptake_surfaces.emergence_role: Only post-simulation evidence can be reviewed for canon; seed intent alone is never canon fact.

emergence_policy.principle: Scenario seeds are pressure fields and initial-condition templates, not scripts.
emergence_policy.outcome_handling: expected_end_states are observation categories and fixture-coverage labels only; they must not be converted into required runtime endings.
emergence_policy.boundedness_guard: Adapters may bound input shape and safety gates, but must leave actor choices, pressure response, branch timing, and outcome selection open to the simulation.

dune_lineage_policy.rule: Dune-derived cards are setting-neutral pressure abstractions. They enrich power, scarcity, prophecy, taboo, monopoly, and sovereignty dynamics without importing source lore or forcing outcomes.

validation_rules: Every fixture_ready_shortlist entry must satisfy the minimum degrees of freedom.
ready_candidate entries may emit root fixture packets; contract_candidate entries may emit uptake planning packets but remain blocked from runtime fixture emission.
Every uptake packet must include all required seed consumers.
Expected end states must be labeled observation categories, not scripted outcomes.
No uptake output path may target a nested repo.
CloudBank and CanonRec remain gated until explicitly named in a later implementation task.
Dune lineage packets must preserve v0.2.2 provenance for SCN-0103, SCN-0105, SCN-0106, SCN-0107, and SCN-0108.
